_metadata.description: Key computational results for Genesis PROV 6 Solid-State Battery

pillar_1_stiffness_trap.description: Gyroid scaffold mechanically suppresses dendrite penetration via biharmonic plate stiffness

biharmonic_suppression_factor.method: Biharmonic plate solver, clamped boundary conditions

pillar_1_stiffness_trap.verification_status: MODEL_ARTIFACT -- Allen-Cahn uses non-conserved order parameter (wrong model class for dendrite growth; Cahn-Hilliard required). The 7.57x suppression factor is a model artifact, not a physical result.

pillar_2_quantum_sieve.description: Sub-nanometer gyroid pores exploit Born solvation energy for ion selectivity

Na_barrier_kJ_mol.method: Calibrated Born model (GROMACS PMF returned NaN)

pillar_2_quantum_sieve.verification_status: VERIFIED (Na+ NaN fixed via calibrated Born model)

pillar_3_tensegrity.description: Gyroid geometry provides bulk modulus through structural topology rather than material density

pillar_4_smart_fuse.description: Rupture-based safety fuse converts hard shorts to soft shorts, preventing thermal runaway

results.selectivity: Dendrite tip stress (500 MPa) >> shock stress (0.03 MPa at 50g)
results.prior_version_note: V1 failed 5/6 tests; ALD coating was the critical fix

ionic_conductivity.description: Lithium ion conductivity in gyroid LLZO from GROMACS MD + Nernst-Einstein

legacy_result.status: SUPERSEDED -- fitting window extended beyond trajectory data

cycle_life.description: Capacity retention from P2D electrochemical model with SEI growth
cycle_life.caveat: SEI growth rate parameter is assumed. Uses legacy conductivity value (optimistic).

thermal_safety.description: Thermal runaway comparison between Genesis SSB and liquid electrolyte

results.key_insight: No flammable electrolyte eliminates primary combustion pathway
